description_long: This is a single athletic shoe, predominantly black with a white Nike Swoosh logo on the side. The upper appears to be made of a breathable mesh material, with synthetic overlays for added structure and durability. The shoe features a low-cut design with a padded collar and tongue, and the lacing system is partially visible, suggesting a standard lace-up closure. The midsole is white and moderately thick, likely made of lightweight foam for cushioning, while the outsole shows a patterned tread for traction. The overall silhouette is streamlined and sporty, suitable for running or training in urban environments.
description: A black athletic shoe with a white Nike Swoosh, mesh upper, and white cushioned sole, designed for sports or urban wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Nike Swoosh logo, mesh upper, and white midsole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel structure and padded collar.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible Swoosh and mesh texture.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the toe box, lacing area, and mesh material.
attribute_logo: White Nike Swoosh on the side of the shoe
